errorMessage.title: Error Message
errorMessage.description: Error message when no leads are found, search term is missing, or lead has no property

leadId.title: Lead Id
leadId.description: The Salesforce record ID of the matched lead (set only when exactly one match is found)

leadName.title: Lead Name
leadName.description: The name of the matched lead

matchCount.title: Match Count
matchCount.description: The number of leads found matching the search term

matchList.title: Match List
matchList.description: A numbered list of matching leads when multiple results are found

propertyAddress.title: Property Address
propertyAddress.description: The formatted address of the property assigned to the lead

propertyId.title: Property Id
propertyId.description: The Salesforce record ID of the property assigned to the lead

propertyName.title: Property Name
propertyName.description: The name of the property assigned to the lead
